cot_prefix: Okay, let's look at the article and see what it says about the order of the places from east to west. The article starts by saying that the businesses are lined up from San Francisco to New York. So San Francisco is the westernmost and New York is the easternmost. Then, it says that from San Francisco to about Reno, the poles are about a foot high. So Reno is between San Francisco and New York. From Reno eastward, the poles increase in height until near Columbus, Ohio, which is about four-fifths of the way across the nation. So Columbus is further east
